auth.twoFactorTitle: Mohon masukkan kode autentikasi dari aplikasi autentikasi anda
auth.twoFactorNote: Catatan: Jika kamu tidak punya akses ke perangkat autentikator-mu, kamu bisa me-reset 2FA dengan kode recovery dengan cara login melalui website.
auth.unlockSuccessDescription: Kamu sekarang sudah bisa autofill di kolom login pada browser mu
auth.autoCloseUnlockPopup: Auto-close pada sign-in di masa mendatang
auth.scanQrCode: Pindai kode QR dengan aplikasi mobile Aliasvalut untuk login dan membuka vault mu
auth.passwordAttemptsWarning: Password salah. Kamu akan di-logout jika memasukkan password yang salah {{remainingAttempts}} kali
auth.maxAttemptsReached: Terlalu banyak percobaan untuk membuka. Kamu di-logout dengan alasan keamanan

errors.serverNotAvailable: Server AliasVault tidak tersedia. Silakan coba lagi nanti atau hubungi layanan pelanggan jika masalah berlanjut.
errors.clientVersionNotSupported: Versi ekstensi browser AliasVault ini sudah tidak didukung lagi oleh server. Silakan perbarui ekstensi browser Anda ke versi terbaru.
errors.browserExtensionOutdated: Ekstensi browser ini versi lawas dan tidak dapat digunakan untuk mengakses brankas ini. Silakan perbarui ekstensi browser ini untuk melanjutkan.
errors.serverVersionNotSupported: Versi lama. Server AliasVault perlu diperbarui ke versi yang lebih baru agar dapat menggunakan ekstensi browser ini. Silakan hubungi dukungan jika Anda membutuhkan bantuan.
errors.serverVersionTooOld: Server AliasVault perlu diperbarui ke versi yang lebih baru agar dapat menggunakan fitur ini. Silakan hubungi admin server jika Anda memerlukan bantuan.
errors.unknownErrorTryAgain: Terjadi kesalahan tidak diketahui. Coba lagi.
errors.passwordChanged: Kata sandi Anda telah berubah sejak terakhir kali Anda masuk. Silakan masuk kembali untuk alasan keamanan.
errors.syncConflictMaxRetries: Sinkronisasi brankas gagal setelah beberapa kali percobaan. Silakan coba lagi nanti.
errors.mergeFailed: Gagal menyatukan perubahan vault. Silakan coba lagi.
errors.vaultTooLarge: Vault terlalu besar untuk diterima server. Coba untuk menghapus beberapa item atau lampiran untuk mengurangi ukuran dan coba lagi.
errors.invalidCode: Mohon masukkan 6-digit kode autentikasi yang valid.
errors.serverError: Tidak dapat menjangkau Server AliasVault. Silakan coba lagi nanti atau hubungi layanan pelanggan jika masalah berlanjut.
errors.wrongPassword: Kata sandi salah. Silakan coba lagi.
errors.sessionExpired: Sesi Anda telah berakhir. Harap masuk kembali.
errors.mobileLoginRequestExpired: Login mobile telah habis waktu. Mohon muat ulang halaman dan coba lagi.

apiErrors.UNKNOWN_ERROR: Terjadi kesalahan tidak diketahui. Coba lagi.
apiErrors.ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Akun Anda sementara terkunci karena terlalu banyak percobaan masuk yang gagal. Silakan coba lagi nanti.
apiErrors.ACCOUNT_BLOCKED: Akun Anda telah dinonaktifkan. Jika Anda yakin ini adalah kesalahan, silakan hubungi layanan pelanggan.
apiErrors.USER_NOT_FOUND: Username atau password salah. Mohon coba lagi.
apiErrors.INVALID_AUTHENTICATOR_CODE: Kode autentikator salah. Mohon coba lagi.
apiErrors.INVALID_RECOVERY_CODE: Kode pemulihan salah. Mohon coba lagi.
apiErrors.PUBLIC_REGISTRATION_DISABLED: Pendaftaran akun baru saat ini dinonaktifkan di server ini. Silakan hubungi administrator.
apiErrors.USERNAME_MISMATCH: Nama pengguna tidak sesuai dengan pengguna saat ini.
apiErrors.PASSWORD_MISMATCH: Kata sandi yang diberikan tidak sesuai dengan kata sandi Anda saat ini.
apiErrors.USERNAME_EMPTY_OR_WHITESPACE: Nama pengguna tidak boleh kosong atau mengandung spasi.
apiErrors.USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Nama pengguna terlalu pendek: harus minimal 3 karakter.
apiErrors.USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Nama pengguna terlalu panjang: tidak boleh lebih dari 40 karakter.
apiErrors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARACTERS: Nama pengguna tidak valid, hanya boleh berisi huruf atau angka.
apiErrors.VAULT_NOT_UP_TO_DATE: Vault Anda bukan yang terkini. Harap sinkronkan vault Anda dan coba lagi.
apiErrors.VAULT_ERROR: Vault lokal Anda belum diperbarui. Harap sinkronkan vault Anda dengan menyegarkan halaman dan coba lagi.

content.randomIdentityDescription: Buat identitas acak dengan alamat email acak yang dapat diakses di AliasVault.
content.manualCredentialDescription: Tentukan alamat email dan nama pengguna Anda sendiri.
content.failedToCreateIdentity: Gagal membuat identitas. Mohon coba lagi.
content.passwordCopiedToClipboard: Kata sandi disalin ke papan klip

items.title: Items
items.welcomeDescription: Untuk menggunakan ekstensi browser AliasVault: kunjungi situs web dan gunakan jendela pop-up isi-otomatis AliasVault untuk membuat kredensial baru.
items.noMatchingItems: Tidak ada item yang sesuai dengan filter yang dipilih.
items.noMatchingItemsWithFilter: Tidak ada {{filter}} items yang sama dengan "{{search}}"
items.emptyFolderHint: Folder ini kosong. Untuk memindahkan item ke folder ini, edit item tersebut dan ketuk ikon folder di kolom nama.
items.allItemsInFolders: Semua item Anda tersusun dalam folder. Klik folder di atas untuk melihat kredensial Anda, atau gunakan pencarian untuk menemukan item tertentu.
items.deleteFolderKeepItemsDescription: Item akan dipindahkan ke folder induk.
items.deleteFolderAndItemsDescription: Sebanyak {{count}} item akan dipindahkan ke Baru Dihapus.
items.deleteItemConfirm: Apakah Anda yakin Anda ingin menghapus item ini?
items.publicEmailDescription: Anonim tetapi privasi terbatas. Isi email dapat dibaca oleh siapa pun yang mengetahui alamat tersebut.

totp.instructions: Enter the secret key shown by the website where you want to add two-factor authentication.
totp.deleteTotpCodeConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the 2FA code "{{name}}"?

attachmentUploader.firefoxExpandRequired: To upload files, use the expanded window.

emails.title: Emails
emails.deleteEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this email?
emails.noEmailsDescription: You have not received any emails at your private email addresses yet. When you receive a new email, it will appear here.
emails.offlineMessage: You are offline. Please connect to the internet to load your emails.

apiErrors.CLAIM_DOES_NOT_MATCH_USER: The current chosen email address is already in use. Please change the email address by editing this credential.
apiErrors.CLAIM_DOES_NOT_EXIST: An error occurred while trying to load the emails. Please try to edit and save the credential entry to synchronize the database, then try again.

settings.activeOnAllSites: Active on all sites (unless disabled below)
settings.autofillMatchingModeDescription: Determines which credentials are considered a match and shown as suggestions in the autofill popup for a given website.
settings.disabledSitesDescription: Sites where the autofill popup will not appear.
settings.clipboardClearTimeoutDescription: Automatically clear the clipboard after copying sensitive data
settings.autoLockTimeoutDescription: Automatically lock the vault after a period of inactivity
settings.autoLockTimeoutHelp: The vault will only lock after the specified period of inactivity (no autofill usage or extension popup opened). The vault will always lock when the browser is closed, regardless of this setting.
settings.contextMenuDescription: Right-click on input fields to access AliasVault options
settings.serverConfigurationDescription: Configure the AliasVault server URL for self-hosted instances
settings.apiUrlHint: The API endpoint URL (usually client URL + /api)
settings.clientUrlHint: The web interface URL of your self-hosted instance
settings.autofillSettingsDescription: Enable or disable the autofill popup on web pages
settings.autofillEnabledDescription: Autofill suggestions will appear on login forms

validation.apiUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid API URL
validation.clientUrlInvalid: Please enter a valid client URL

identityGeneratorSettings.description: Configure the default language and gender preference for generating new identities.
identityGeneratorSettings.languageDescription: Set the language that will be used when generating new identities.
identityGeneratorSettings.genderDescription: Set the gender preference for generating new identities.
identityGeneratorSettings.ageRangeDescription: Set the age range for generating new identities.

settings.credentialAutofillDescription: Show autofill popup when username/password fields are detected
settings.totpAutofillDescription: Show autofill popup when 2FA code fields are detected
settings.autoCopyTotpOnAutofillDescription: Automatically copy the first 2FA code to clipboard after autofilling credentials

loginSave.title: Save Login Prompt
loginSave.description: Show a prompt to save login credentials when you submit a login form on a website.
loginSave.blockedSitesDescription: Sites where the save prompt will never appear.

unlockMethod.title: Vault Unlock Method
unlockMethod.introText: Choose how you want to unlock your vault. You can use your master password (always available) or set up a PIN code for faster access. After 3 failed PIN attempts, you'll need to use your master password.
unlockMethod.enterNewPinDescription: Enter a PIN code consisting of minimum 6 digits
unlockMethod.confirmPinDescription: Enter your PIN again to confirm
unlockMethod.pinLocked: PIN unlock has been disabled. Please use your master password to unlock your vault.
unlockMethod.pinSecurityWarning: PIN unlock in the browser extension can be less secure than your master password, as PINs typically have lower entropy and may be brute-forced if your device is compromised. Use it only on devices you fully trust.

passkeys.helpText: Passkeys are created on the website when prompted. They cannot be manually edited. To remove this passkey, you can delete it from this credential. To replace this passkey or create a new one, visit the website and follow its prompts.
passkeys.passkeyWillBeDeleted: This passkey will be deleted when you save this credential.

bypass.description: How long would you like to use the browser's passkey provider for {{origin}}?

authenticate.title: Sign in with Passkey
authenticate.selectPasskey: Select a passkey to sign in:
authenticate.noPasskeysFound: No passkeys found for this site

create.title: Create Passkey
create.titlePlaceholder: Enter a name for this passkey
create.selectExistingLoginDescription: Attach this passkey to an existing login credential for this site.

recentlyDeleted.title: Recently Deleted
recentlyDeleted.noItemsDescription: Items you delete will appear here for {{days}} days before being permanently removed.
recentlyDeleted.description: These items will be permanently deleted after {{days}} days. You can restore them or delete them immediately.
recentlyDeleted.confirmDeleteMessage: This item will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.
recentlyDeleted.confirmEmptyAllMessage: All {{count}} items will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Vault
upgrade.subtitle: AliasVault has updated and your vault needs to be upgraded. This should only take a few seconds.
upgrade.whatsNewDescription: An upgrade is required to support the following changes:
upgrade.noDescriptionAvailable: No description available for this version.

alerts.unableToGetVersionInfo: Unable to get version information. Please try again.
alerts.selfHostedWarning: If you're using a self-hosted server, make sure to also update your self-hosted instance as otherwise logging in to the web client will stop working.

logout.unsyncedChangesWarning: You have unsynced changes that will be lost if you log out now. Are you sure you want to continue?
